overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulation game showing nighttime driving on a multi-lane highway during heavy rain. The player follows a yellow car through increasingly intense rainfall, overtaking other vehicles and passing under overhead gantries before approaching a toll booth area.

segments.scene_description: The rain intensifies significantly as the vehicle continues down the highway, reducing visibility. The driver overtakes a large white truck on the right while following the yellow car ahead. A concrete central barrier appears on the left, and the first overhead gantry structure becomes visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Driving through the darkest section of the highway with very heavy rainfall, passing under overhead gantry structures. The concrete barrier exits the frame as the road widens, and a large toll gantry with green signage becomes visible ahead in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and passes under the toll booth gantry with bright overhead lighting cutting through the heavy rain. A blue car overtakes on the left at high speed while the driver continues following the yellow car through the toll plaza area, with guardrails visible on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along a nighttime highway as moderate rain escalates into a heavy downpour. It begins with the vehicle following a yellow car under the glow of streetlights, while a white car overtakes on the right beside metal guardrails. As the rainfall intensifies and visibility drops, the camera moves past a large white truck and approaches a concrete central barrier and a distant overhead gantry. The scene then shifts into the darkest stretch of the highway, passing under several gantry structures as the road widens and a large toll gantry with green signage emerges ahead. Finally, the vehicle passes under the brightly lit toll booth gantry amidst the torrential rain, just as a blue car streaks past on the left.
